This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Get information about the authenticated user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the profile information for the currently authenticated user. This operation requires valid authentication credentials. Returns the user object containing profile details such as user ID, email, name, and account status. No request body is required.
data.reasoning: The operation lacks a summary entirely and the description is too minimal. Added a clear, action-oriented summary. Enhanced description to specify: authentication requirement, what data is returned (user object with specific fields), and clarification that no request body is needed. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'deleteApiV1CommunitiesCommunityIdUsersUserId' has semantic quality issues: missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks information about side effects (user loses access, membership termination) and what the operation returns. Enhanced description clarifies the state changes and response format for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Remove a user from a community
data.current_description: Remove a user from a community given a user_id and a community_id
data.description_suggestion: Removes a specified user from a community. Requires the community_id and user_id as path parameters. The user will lose access to community resources and their membership will be terminated. Returns a success response with no content.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks information about side effects (user loses access, membership termination) and what the operation returns. Enhanced description clarifies the state changes and response format for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getApiV1CommunitiesCommunityIdCourseBundles' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description is too minimal. Enhanced description clarifies what course bundles are returned, the required parameter, the response structure, and access control logic to help AI agents understand filtering behavior and response content.

data.current_summary: List of course bundles in community
data.current_description: Returns course bundles in the community
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all course bundles available within a specified community. Requires the community_id as a path parameter. Returns a list of course bundle objects containing bundle metadata, associated courses, and availability information. Only bundles accessible to the authenticated user are returned.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is too minimal. Enhanced description clarifies what course bundles are returned, the required parameter, the response structure, and access control logic to help AI agents understand filtering behavior and response content.

message: Operation 'getApiV1CommunitiesCommunityIdCourses' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is clear but description lacks detail. Enhanced description specifies the required parameter, clarifies what course information is returned, and explains access control filtering to improve AI agent understanding of response content and filtering behavior.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all courses available within a specified community. Requires the community_id as a path parameter. Returns a list of course objects with course metadata, enrollment status, and availability information. Only courses accessible to the authenticated user are included.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks detail. Enhanced description specifies the required parameter, clarifies what course information is returned, and explains access control filtering to improve AI agent understanding of response content and filtering behavior.

message: Operation 'getApiV1CommunitiesCommunityIdCoursesEnrollments' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details. Summary is too generic and doesn't specify the community scope. Description lacks context about what enrollments are returned and filtering logic. Improved summary adds community context, and enhanced description clarifies the required parameter, response structure, and access control filtering for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns enrollments for courses in the community
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve course enrollments in a community
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves enrollment records for all courses within a specified community. Requires the community_id as a path parameter. Returns a list of enrollment objects containing user enrollment status, course references, enrollment dates, and progress information. Results are filtered to show only enrollments visible to the authenticated user.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic and doesn't specify the community scope. Description lacks context about what enrollments are returned and filtering logic. Improved summary adds community context, and enhanced description clarifies the required parameter, response structure, and access control filtering for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getApiV1CommunitiesCommunityIdCredentialsEarned' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description is vague about scope and filtering. Enhanced description clarifies the required parameter, specifies what credential information is included in the response, and explains permission-based filtering to help AI agents understand data access patterns and response content.

data.current_description: Returns community credentials earned by members
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves credentials earned by community members within a specified community. Requires the community_id as a path parameter. Returns a list of earned credential objects containing credential metadata, recipient information, issuance dates, and verification details. Results are filtered based on the authenticated user's permissions and visibility settings.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is vague about scope and filtering. Enhanced description clarifies the required parameter, specifies what credential information is included in the response, and explains permission-based filtering to help AI agents understand data access patterns and response content.

message: Operation 'getApiV1CommunitiesCommunityIdMemberships' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is clear but description lacks specificity. Enhanced description clarifies the required parameter, details what membership information is returned (status, roles, dates, permissions), and explains access control filtering to improve AI agent understanding of response structure and data visibility rules.

data.current_summary: List of memberships in a community
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all membership records for a specified community. Requires the community_id as a path parameter. Returns a list of membership objects containing member information, membership status, roles, join dates, and permissions. Only memberships visible to the authenticated user are included based on community access controls.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks specificity. Enhanced description clarifies the required parameter, details what membership information is returned (status, roles, dates, permissions), and explains access control filtering to improve AI agent understanding of response structure and data visibility rules.

message: Operation 'getApiV1CoursesCourseIdEnrollments' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. data.current_description: Subscribes to a webhook that triggers when an action happens. Individual webhooks will be documented elsewhere in the overall API documentation.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook subscription for the specified event type. Requires a URL endpoint and event type in the request body. Returns the created webhook object with a unique webhook ID for future reference and management. Webhook payloads can be verified using HMAC-SHA256 signatures provided in request headers.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description is too vague. It doesn't specify what inputs are required (URL, event type), what the response contains (webhook ID), or how to use the webhook.
